creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Is there a reason why we're not using upstream release archive as recommended by Porters Handbook?
https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/book/#makefile-master_sites-github
https://github.com/jeremyevans/aqualung/releases/tag/1.2
This would also very likely get rid of USES= autoreconf

Any plans to upstream
https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/audio/aqualung/files/patch-src_decoder_dec__mac.cpp ?
